---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or developer-facing improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the capability that should be added or improved.

## Problem to solve

Explain the current limitation, friction, or missing workflow.

## Proposed direction

Describe the preferred solution, even if only at a high level.

## Scope

- Frontend
- Member center
- Admin / Filament
- Docs
- Commerce / payment
- Other:

## Additional context

Add links, screenshots, or reference systems when helpful.
